name: Fighting Style
description: Gain an additional Fighting Style

name: Incendiary Traps
description: You may add the Fire tag to your trap effects. Creatures that trigger the trap begin Burning for d6 each turn.

name: Poison Traps
description: You may add the Toxic tag to your trap effects. Creatures that trigger the trap are Impaired.

name: Big Game Hunter
description: Your traps have their full effect on creatures larger than a typical kin, even if they have the Detachment tag.

name: Quick Deploy
description: Once per session, you may place a trap immediately, even during pitched battle.

name: Ritual
description: Gain an additional Ritual

name: Psychometry
description:
You can enter your mind palace while holding an object to learn the following information:
The object’s function
The last creature who used it
Any scenes it witnessed that would leave a strong impression

name: Profiling
description:
You can enter your mind palace while focusing on a specific person. You simulate a conversation with that person, where they respond as if they were speaking with a trusted confidante. You can learn the following information:
Their motivation
What they fear most
Their most likely next steps

name: Residual Arcana
description: When upgraded with the Blast tag, the spell leaves behind a lingering hazard in the area corresponding to the type of damage until the end of the scene.

name: Arcane Strike
description: Make a melee attack instead, increasing the damage die by one step.

name: Expanded Repertoire
description: Gain an additional spell of your Tier or lower.

name: Potent Prayer
description: When you use a prayer, its effect is increased as if you had spent an additional focus.

name: Hallowed Ground
description: When you use a prayer, the area around you (Near) becomes Hallowed until the end of the scene. Undead and demons take 1d6 damage when they enter or start their turn in the area.

name: Divine Intervention
description: Once per session, you can call for your deity's direct help. Describe what you want to happen; the GM will decide the cost or consequence.

name: Backstab
description: When you attack an unaware or Impaired enemy from hiding or from behind, add +1d6 to your damage die.

name: Coup de Grace
description: When you use Ambush against an enemy with 5 HP or less, they are immediately taken out of the fight.

name: Vanish
description: Once per scene, you can spend 1 Stress to immediately enter hiding, even if you are being observed.

name: Assassinate
description: When you use Ambush, you may choose to automatically deal a Critical Hit instead of rolling your attack die. This can stack with Secret Technique.

name: Alter Self
description: Through alchemical or magical means, you can transform your body to impersonate someone of another ancestry and gender. The effect lasts for 8 hours.

name: Chameleon
description: You can spend 2 stress to immediately swap your current disguise for another one, easily throwing off suspicion.

name: Shadowstep
description: When you first use Warm Shadow, or when you spend 1 Stress while invisible, you can teleport up to a Near distance to another area of darkness or shadow.

name: Ghost
description: Your invisibility lasts up to 10 minutes and the first time your invisibility would break, you may instead remain invisible.

name: Multitasking
description: Choose two benefits and gain both benefits. You can’t choose the same benefit twice.

name: Cannibalize
description: If you have a few minutes to spare, consume a Curio or Artifact to give yourself or one ally one of the benefits above. This does not count as the per-session use of this ability

name: The Flesh is Weak
description: Choose another body part to replace. You can't make the same choice twice.

name: Cognitoculus
description: Gain an additional void Eye. Spend 1 Stress. For the rest of the scene, you can see what someone is currently thinking about.

name: Ardenoculus
description: Gain an additional void Eye. Spend 1 Stress. For the rest of the scene, your gaze acts as a ranged weapon (2d8, near, ignores armor).
